text.title: gitlab-cicd Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gitlab-cicd as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Caching dist/ or build/ output directories.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Built assets change every pipeline. Cache miss is expensive (re-download on every job). Use artifacts: paths: [dist/] instead.
